title: Milton Galaxia 2500 Insulated Stainless Steel Casserole, 2500 ml | 84 oz| 2.6 qt. Thermal Serving Bowl, Keeps Food Hot & Cold for Long Hours, Elegant Hot Pot Food Warmer Cooler, Silver
features: ✅ Please ensure you choose the perfect size for your needs by consulting our detailed sizing information present on our second selling image. Take a moment to review the size chart before placing your order.
✅ Despite its seemingly compact size, be confident that the capacity specified in the title is the exact capacity of the product you have received for your food storage requirements.

✅ Maximize heat and cold retention by pre-conditioning your casserole with hot or cold water before storing respective items. Ensure better temperature retention results by filling the casserole to maximum capacity.

✅ Superior thermal insulation: The Milton Galaxia 2500 Insulated Stainless Steel Casserole features advanced thermal insulation technology that keeps your food hot or cold for extended periods. It ensures your dishes stay at the desired temperature for hours, making it perfect for picnics, potlucks, parties, and everyday use.

✅ Generous capacity: With a spacious 2500 ml capacity, this casserole dish is ideal for serving large quantities of food. Whether you're hosting a family gathering or preparing a hearty meal, the Galaxia can accommodate your needs.

✅ Premium stainless steel construction: Crafted from high-quality stainless steel, this casserole is built to last. The durable and corrosion-resistant material ensures long-term use, even with frequent washing and handling. Elegant and sleek design: The Galaxia Casserole features a stylish Silver finish that adds a touch of sophistication to your dining table or buffet spread.

✅ Easy-to-use and maintain: The casserole comes with a convenient lid that locks securely, ensuring no spills or leaks during transport. The wide opening allows for easy serving and cleaning. Additionally, it is dishwasher safe, saving you time and effort on cleanup.

✅ Milton: Founded in 1972, Milton has become one of the most celebrated homeware brands across the globe, Milton aims to provide high-quality products that solve consumer problems by continuously innovating, setting new standards and doing outstanding work, Believes in moving forward, evolving and bringing the winds of change to every household with its product range.
description: From the manufacturer Milton Galaxia Stainless Steel Casserole, 2.5 Liters, Silver Keep your food piping hot and fresh Milton brings to you this handy double insulated casserole. The insulated construction of the casserole retains the temperature of the food kept inside it for long durations, while the steel body is sturdy and safe. It has an easy locking system that secures your food and an integrated handle that is ergonomic in design. Brushed-Steel Finish This double-walled stainless steel casserole has a brushed-steel exterior. This adds to the appeal of the casserole and lends it an elegant finish that can be the highlight of your dining table alongside your food. Keeps Food Fresh This casserole from Milton has an inner and outer steel body. Its double-walled insulation keeps your chapattis and other foods fresh for you to consume hours after you have prepared it. Double Walled Insulation This Milton casserole is well-insulated and it keeps hot foods hot and cold foods cold for a long time. It will keep your food fresh and piping hot for your indulgence, even if you join the feast a little late. Integrated Handle The integrated handles of this insulated casserole offer a host of conveniences. Simply grab the casserole by the handles and carry your food from the kitchen to the dining table. There is a handle at the top of the lid to facilitate easy opening as well. Easy Locking System This handy casserole from Milton comes with an easy locking system that requires you to simply twist the lid in place. This locking system will secure your food and the casserole will retain the temperature of the food. Easy to Clean To keep the casserole looking as good as new, you can clean its exterior surface using a wet sponge or a cotton cloth regularly. Use a mild detergent to clean the interior to prevent the residue of the food from settling in.
